mapper.select: SELECT * FROM task WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task (task_name, task_type, project_id, topic_id, status, progress, result, error_msg, start_time, end_time, create_user_id) VALUES (#{taskName}, #{taskType}, #{projectId}, #{topicId}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{result}, #{errorMsg}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET task_name = #{taskName}, task_type = #{taskType}, project_id = #{projectId}, topic_id = #{topicId}, status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, result = #{result}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE task SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
